meta.summary: Today’s AI signal is thin. The only notable confirmed item is Google’s iOS live translation update for headphones, which matters as a practical consumer AI feature but does not look like a major ecosystem-shaping story on the available evidence. A broader Google search product rollout is worth watching, but it remains early in this dataset.

x_buzz.title: Show HN: I put an AI agent on a $7/month VPS with IRC as its transport layer
x_buzz.summary: The stack: two agents on separate boxes. The public one (nullclaw) is a 678 KB Zig binary using ~1 MB RAM, connected to an Ergo IRC server. Visitors talk to it via a gamja web client embedded in my site. The private one (ironclaw) handles email and scheduling, reachable only over Tailscale via Google's A2A protocol. Tiered inference: Haiku 4.5 for conversation (sub-second, cheap), Sonnet 4.6 for tool use (only whe...
